titleStmt.title: Senator Austin to the Acting Secretary of State

head.hi: Senator Austin to the Acting Secretary of State

div.p: 851. Re armed forces USdel decided this morning:28th Meeting of the United States Delegation, 9 a.m. 1. To make early statement along lines determined on November 23 (now embodied in US/A/C.1/69, Rev. A),United States Delegation position paper US/A/C.1/69, November 22, a draft resolution approved by the Delegation on November 23, is printed in telegram 843, November 23, from New York, p. 1042. US/A/C.1/69 (rev.a) differed from the original draft only in matters of minor wording and in its sub-paragraph A.3 which read as follows: “The number of such personnel on the territory of each other country in which they are stationed.” (IO Files) except that we would not give out information on our armed forces unilaterally;

list.item: To seek to secure agreement among the several draft resolutions in a subcommittee (of Committee I);
To oppose provisions for verification of reports and to authorize political officers to inform British to this effect.
